testcase.name: Navigation and Routing › should display main navigation menu
Navigation and Routing › should navigate to assets page via menu
Navigation and Routing › should navigate to dashboard page
Navigation and Routing › should navigate to settings pages
Navigation and Routing › should navigate through nested menu items
Navigation and Routing › should display breadcrumbs on detail pages
Navigation and Routing › should support browser back navigation
Navigation and Routing › should support browser forward navigation
Navigation and Routing › should highlight active menu item
Navigation and Routing › should preserve navigation state across page reloads
